meta.name: Manage coupon campaigns and customer chats with WhatsApp and PostgreSQL

parameters.query:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) as customers,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) as messages,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM records) as records,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM companies) as companies;
SELECT * FROM companies ORDER BY company_id DESC;

={{ $json.body.httpMethod === 'POST' ? "INSERT INTO companies (name, info) VALUES ('" + $json.body.body.name + "', '" + ($json.body.body.info || "") + "') RETURNING *;" : ($json.body.httpMethod === 'PUT' ? "UPDATE companies SET name = '" + $json.body.body.name + "', info = '" + ($json.body.body.info || "") + "' WHERE company_id = " + $json.body.body.company_id + " RETURNING *;" : "DELETE FROM companies WHERE company_id = " + $json.body.body.company_id + " RETURNING *;") }}
SELECT c.*, co.name as company_name FROM coupons c JOIN companies co ON c.company_id = co.company_id ORDER BY c.coupon_id DESC;

={{ $json.body.httpMethod === 'POST' ? 
  "INSERT INTO coupons (company_id, coupon_text, coupon_value, is_percentage, has_max, max_value, is_max_percentage, has_min_purchase, min_purchase_value, is_on_items_quantity, has_expiry, expiry_date, other_info) VALUES (" + 
  $json.body.body.company_id + ", '" + 
  $json.body.body.coupon_text + "', " + 
  ($json.body.body.coupon_value ? $json.body.body.coupon_value : "NULL") + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.is_percentage || false) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.has_max || false) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.max_value || 0) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.is_max_percentage || false) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.has_min_purchase || false) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.min_purchase_value || 0) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.is_on_items_quantity || false) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.has_expiry || false) + ", " + 
  ($json.body.body.expiry_date ? "'" + $json.body.body.expiry_date + "'" : "NULL") + ", '" + 
  ($json.body.body.other_info || "") + "') RETURNING *;" 
  : 
  "DELETE FROM coupons WHERE coupon_id = " + $json.body.body.coupon_id + " RETURNING *;" 
}}

SELECT DISTINCT ON (COALESCE(c.phone, m.sender_phone))
  m.message_id,
  m.message_text,
  m.created_at,
  m.direction,
  m.customer_id,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c.name, ''), NULLIF(m.sender_name, ''), 'Unknown Customer') as customer_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c.phone, ''), NULLIF(m.sender_phone, ''), 'Without Number') as customer_phone
FROM messages m 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON m.customer_id = c.customer_id 
ORDER BY COALESCE(c.phone, m.sender_phone), m.created_at DESC;
SELECT * FROM settings;

={{ "SELECT 
  m.*,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c.name, ''), NULLIF(m.sender_name, ''), 'Unknown Customer') as customer_name,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(c.phone, ''), NULLIF(m.sender_phone, ''), 'Without Number') as customer_phone
FROM messages m 
LEFT JOIN customers c ON m.customer_id = c.customer_id 
WHERE REPLACE(COALESCE(c.phone, m.sender_phone), '+', '') = '" + ($json.body.customer_phone ? $json.body.customer_phone.toString().replace('+', '') : '') + "'
ORDER BY m.created_at ASC 
LIMIT 100;" }}
SELECT * FROM customers ORDER BY created_at DESC;

SELECT r.*, c.name as customer_name, co.name as company_name, cp.coupon_text 
FROM records r 
JOIN customers c ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id 
JOIN companies co ON r.company_id = co.company_id 
JOIN coupons cp ON r.coupon_id = cp.coupon_id 
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC;
SELECT * FROM settings WHERE key = 'admin_phone';

={{ "INSERT INTO customers (name, phone, updated_at) VALUES ('" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING customer_id;" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO messages (customer_id, sender_phone, sender_name, message_text, message_type, direction, created_at) VALUES (" + ($('Upsert Customer').item.json.customer_id || 'NULL') + ", '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_type || 'text') + "', 'INCOMING', NOW());" }}
={{ "SELECT * FROM sessions WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}
SELECT * FROM companies WHERE name != 'Add Company' ORDER BY company_id DESC LIMIT 10;
={{ 'SELECT * FROM coupons WHERE company_id = ' + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.button_id.split('_')[1] + ' AND (expiry_date IS NULL OR expiry_date > NOW()) ORDER BY coupon_value DESC LIMIT 10;' }}
={{ 'SELECT * FROM coupons WHERE coupon_id = ' + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.button_id.split('_')[1] + ';' }}

={{ "INSERT INTO records (customer_id, company_id, coupon_id, created_at) SELECT (SELECT customer_id FROM customers WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "' LIMIT 1), " + ($json.company_id || 0) + ", " + ($json.coupon_id || 0) + ", NOW() WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM customers WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "');" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO companies (name) VALUES ('" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'); UPDATE sessions SET state = 'IDLE' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}
={{ "INSERT INTO sessions (phone, state) VALUES ('" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "', 'WAITING_COMPANY_NAME') ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET state = 'WAITING_COMPANY_NAME';" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO messages (customer_id, sender_phone, sender_name, message_text, message_type, direction, created_at) VALUES (" + ($('Upsert Customer').item.json.customer_id || 'NULL') + ", '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + ($items("Get Companies List").length === 0 || ($items("Get Companies List").length === 1 && !$items("Get Companies List")[0].json.company_id) ? "Sorry, no companies are currently available." : "Welcome! Choose a company to view coupons:").replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'text', 'OUTGOING', NOW());" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO messages (customer_id, sender_phone, sender_name, message_text, message_type, direction, created_at) VALUES (" + ($('Upsert Customer').item.json.customer_id || 'NULL') + ", '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + ($items("Get Coupons List").length === 0 || ($items("Get Coupons List").length === 1 && !$items("Get Coupons List")[0].json.coupon_id) ? "Sorry, no coupons are available for this company right now." : "Choose a coupon:").replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'text', 'OUTGOING', NOW());" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO messages (customer_id, sender_phone, sender_name, message_text, message_type, direction, created_at) VALUES (" + ($('Upsert Customer').item.json.customer_id || 'NULL') + ", '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + ("Coupon Details:
Code: " + ($('Get Coupon Details').item.json.coupon_text || '') + "
Value: " + ($('Get Coupon Details').item.json.coupon_value || '') + ($('Get Coupon Details').item.json.is_percentage ? '%' : '') + "
" + ($('Get Coupon Details').item.json.other_info ? 'Notes: ' + $('Get Coupon Details').item.json.other_info : '') + "

Thank you for choosing us!").replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'text', 'OUTGOING', NOW());" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO messages (customer_id, sender_phone, sender_name, message_text, message_type, direction, created_at) VALUES (" + ($('Upsert Customer').item.json.customer_id || 'NULL') + ", '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'Company added successfully!', 'text', 'OUTGOING', NOW());" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO messages (customer_id, sender_phone, sender_name, message_text, message_type, direction, created_at) VALUES (" + ($('Upsert Customer').item.json.customer_id || 'NULL') + ", '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'Please enter the new company name:', 'text', 'OUTGOING', NOW());" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO messages (customer_id, sender_phone, sender_name, message_text, message_type, direction, created_at) VALUES (" + ($('Upsert Customer').item.json.customer_id || 'NULL') + ", '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone || '') + "', '" + ($('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_name || 'Unknown').replace(/'/g, "''") + "', 'Welcome Admin. Menu:', 'text', 'OUTGOING', NOW());" }}

={{ "UPDATE companies SET name = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "' WHERE company_id = " + ($('Get User Session').item.json.data?.company_id || 0) + "; UPDATE sessions SET state = 'IDLE', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Company edited successfully!" } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "DELETE FROM companies WHERE company_id = " + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.button_id.split('_')[1] + "; UPDATE sessions SET state = 'IDLE', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Company deleted successfully!" } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE sessions SET state = 'WAITING_ADD_COUPON_TEXT', data = '{\"company_id\": " + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.button_id.split('_')[1] + "}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Enter the coupon code:" } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE sessions SET state = 'WAITING_ADD_COUPON_VALUE', data = data || '{\"coupon_text\": \"" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_text.replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/'/g, "''") + "\"}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Enter the discount value (number only):\n\nOr type \"skip\" if you don't know the value" } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Coupon added successfully!" } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE sessions SET state = 'WAITING_EDIT_COUPON_TEXT', data = '{\"coupon_id\": " + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.button_id.split('_')[1] + "}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Enter the new coupon code:" } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE coupons SET coupon_text = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "' WHERE coupon_id = " + ($('Get User Session').item.json.data?.coupon_id || 0) + "; UPDATE sessions SET state = 'IDLE', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Coupon edited successfully!" } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "DELETE FROM coupons WHERE coupon_id = " + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.button_id.split('_')[1] + "; UPDATE sessions SET state = 'IDLE', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Coupon deleted successfully!" } }) }}

parameters.query: ={{ "UPDATE sessions SET state = 'WAITING_EDIT_COMPANY_NAME', data = '{\"company_id\": " + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.button_id.split('_')[1] + "}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ messaging_product: "whatsapp", to: $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone, type: "text", text: { body: "Enter the new company name:" } }) }}

={{ "INSERT INTO sessions (phone, state) VALUES ('" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "', 'WAITING_EDIT_COMPANY_SELECT') ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET state = 'WAITING_EDIT_COMPANY_SELECT';" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO sessions (phone, state) VALUES ('" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "', 'WAITING_DELETE_COMPANY_SELECT') ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET state = 'WAITING_DELETE_COMPANY_SELECT';" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO sessions (phone, state) VALUES ('" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "', 'WAITING_ADD_COUPON_COMPANY') ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET state = 'WAITING_ADD_COUPON_COMPANY';" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO sessions (phone, state) VALUES ('" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "', 'WAITING_EDIT_COUPON_SELECT') ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET state = 'WAITING_EDIT_COUPON_SELECT';" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO sessions (phone, state) VALUES ('" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "', 'WAITING_DELETE_COUPON_SELECT') ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET state = 'WAITING_DELETE_COUPON_SELECT';" }}
SELECT key, value FROM settings WHERE key IN ('welcome_message', 'end_message');
SELECT value FROM settings WHERE key = 'end_message';
={{ "UPDATE sessions SET state = 'EDIT_WELCOME', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO settings (key, value) VALUES ('welcome_message', '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "') ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value; UPDATE sessions SET state = 'IDLE', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}
={{ "UPDATE sessions SET state = 'EDIT_END', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO settings (key, value) VALUES ('end_message', '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.message_text.replace(/'/g, "''") + "') ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET value = EXCLUDED.value; UPDATE sessions SET state = 'IDLE', data = '{}' WHERE phone = '" + $('Set Basic Data').item.json.sender_phone + "';" }}

parameters.content:
# 🎯 Coupon Bot Dashboard

A complete admin dashboard for managing discount coupons, 
companies, and customer conversations via WhatsApp/Telegram.

### How it works:
1. Dashboard UI served via webhook endpoint
2. REST API for CRUD operations (Companies, Coupons, Settings)
3. PostgreSQL database for data persistence
4. Real-time inbox for customer chat history

### Setup steps:
1. Configure PostgreSQL credentials (discounts DB)
2. Run /execute-init to create database schema
3. Access dashboard at /coupon-bot/dashboard
4. Set admin phone in Settings tab

⚠️ Run /migrate first if upgrading existing database

📊 Dashboard UI
- Vue.js 3 + Tailwind CSS interface
- English LTR layout
- Responsive mobile design
- Served via RespondToWebhook node

🗄️ Database Schema
- Customers, Companies, Coupons tables
- Messages & Records tracking
- Settings & Sessions management
- Migration support for updates

🔌 REST API Routes
- GET/POST /api/companies
- GET/POST /api/coupons  
- GET/POST /api/settings
- GET /api/stats, /api/inbox, /api/history

⚙️ System Tools
- Database initialization (/execute-init)
- Schema migration & repair (/migrate)
- Full reset capability
- Settings management

💬 Customer Inbox System
- Real-time chat interface
- Message history tracking
- Customer conversation threads
- WhatsApp/Telegram integration ready
- Webhook endpoints: /api/inbox, /api/history

👥 Customer Management
- Customer profiles and phone tracking
- Coupon usage records
- Usage analytics and history
- API endpoints: /api/customers, /api/records

# 🤖 WhatsApp Coupon Bot

Complete WhatsApp Business API integration for the Coupon Dashboard. Handles customer conversations and admin management via WhatsApp.

---
# 🔄 Session-Based State Management

The bot uses PostgreSQL sessions table to track conversations across multiple messages.

How it works:
• Each phone number has one active session
• State column tracks current operation (IDLE, WAITING_COMPANY_NAME, etc.)
• Data column stores temporary info as JSON
• Sessions persist until operation completes

Common states:
• IDLE - default state, no active operation
• WAITING_COMPANY_NAME - adding new company
• WAITING_ADD_COUPON_TEXT - entering coupon code
• WAITING_ADD_COUPON_VALUE - entering discount value
• WAITING_EDIT_COMPANY_SELECT - selecting company to edit
• EDIT_WELCOME / EDIT_END - customizing messages

Best practice: Always reset to IDLE after operation completes and clear data field.
## 📋 How It Works

### 1. Webhook Reception
- Receives messages from WhatsApp Business API
- Validates message type (text, button, interactive)
- Extracts sender info and message content

### 2. User Authentication
- Checks if sender is admin (matches `admin_phone` in settings)
- **Regular users** → Customer flow
- **Admin users** → Admin management flow

## 🔧 Setup Requirements

### 1. WhatsApp Business API Credentials
- Phone Number ID
- Access Token (Bearer Auth)

### 2. PostgreSQL Database
- Same DB as Dashboard
- Tables: `customers`, `companies`, `coupons`, `messages`, `records`, `sessions`, `settings`

### 3. Webhook Configuration
- Endpoint: `/webhook/whatsapp`
- Verify token configured in Meta

### 4. Admin Setup
- Set `admin_phone` in dashboard settings
- Admin gets full management menu

---

## 🌐 API Endpoints Used
- **Facebook Graph API v22.0** for sending messages
- **Interactive messages** (lists, buttons)
- **Text messages** with custom content

# 🔄 Session-Based State Management

The bot uses PostgreSQL sessions table to track conversations across multiple messages.

How it works:
• Each phone number has one active session
• State column tracks current operation (IDLE, WAITING_COMPANY_NAME, etc.)
• Data column stores temporary info as JSON
• Sessions persist until operation completes

Common states:
• IDLE - default state, no active operation
• WAITING_COMPANY_NAME - adding new company
• WAITING_ADD_COUPON_TEXT - entering coupon code
• WAITING_ADD_COUPON_VALUE - entering discount value
• WAITING_EDIT_COMPANY_SELECT - selecting company to edit
• EDIT_WELCOME / EDIT_END - customizing messages

Best practice: Always reset to IDLE after operation completes and clear data field.

# 🔌 WhatsApp API Integration & User Routing

Message Types:
• Text - simple replies and confirmations (4096 chars max)
• Interactive List - company/coupon selection (10 items max)
• Button Reply - quick actions (3 buttons max)

User Detection:
• Compares sender phone with admin_phone setting
• Routes to Admin Path or Customer Path automatically

Customer Path:
Show welcome → List companies → Select company → View coupons → Send details

Admin Path:
Show menu → Manage companies/coupons → Edit messages → Test as customer

API Endpoint:
POST https://graph.facebook.com/v22.0/{phone_number_id}/messages
Authentication: Bearer Token

Common issues:
• Message not delivered: check phone format with country code
• List not showing: verify max 10 items and valid JSON
